calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Dec-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deb Fox, via Zoom, for Eva Zieleniewicz, Petitioner/Executor.

Counsel confirms that a petition for final distribution is nearly ready to file and that there have been some adjustments to calculations included in the accounting petition set for hearing on Dec-20-2022 and requests to continue that matter to file an amended petition and provide proper notice. The court grants counsel's request and the Dec-20-2022 hearing re the accounting in this matter is continued to Dec-27-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 in open court. The court confirms that there are no objections to the petition set for hearing today and confirms with counsel that the court had previously admitted the will dated Apr-27-2014 to probate on Nov-25-2020 but then the Petitioner offered later-discovered testamentary instruments by Petition for Probate of After-Discovered Will filed Sep-07-2022. Accordingly, the court hereby revokes the previous admission of the Will dated Apr-27-2014 and now admits the Will dated May-15-2015 and Codicil dated Apr-11-2017 to Probate. The order thereon is signed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nazaruz. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Continued To Dec-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Continued To Nov-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deb Fox, via Zoom, for Eva Zieleniewicz, Executor.

Ms. Fox advises that she believes that the 2015 Will and 2017 Codicil were discovered in April of 2021. The court advises that it is inclined to require that the 2015 Will and 2017 Codicil be admitted. Ms. Fox offers advocacy for the instant petition. The court reiterates that it is not inclined to move forward with this petition when the Will and Codicil have not been admitted to probate.

The matter is continued to Nov-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is proper and no one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 27, 2014 is admitted to probate. Eva Zieleniewicz is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2020 Continued To Nov-25-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
